productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Wallet
description: Style Note Worry no more about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from United Colours of Benetton. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product DetailsBlack wallet with a press buttoned flap closureFive card holder slots, one id holder slot on the flapOne main compartment with a seperator and six organiser slotsAnother compartment with a press buttoned flap closure Material and Care 100% polyurethane Wipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt Size Height: 11 cm Width: 20 cm Depth: 3.5 cm
